Rules.ErrorMessage: The operation intensity is low indicating a memory bound kernel. Look into improving data load/store.
ERROR: Register spilling is occuring in this kernel! See section 7.1.4 of the Adreno OpenCL Programming Guide for solutions.
Low ALU utilization may indicate a memory bound kernel. Look into improving data load/store.
Low L2 value may indicate poor cache usage. Look into improving data load/store. Look at tuning the workgroup size.
